expected_effect: Preserve the anti-arb and low-slice gains of the tri-channel anchor while lifting retail retention and keeping passive relief narrowly targeted.
expected_failure_signature: If inventory centering still behaves like a broad passive rebate, quote_selectivity falls and retail_edge does not recover enough to clear the promotion margin.
expected_win_condition: Beat the breakout gate with arb_loss_to_retail_gain below 0.11 while keeping retail_edge at or above baseline.
hidden_coupling_removed: Inventory centering should not share the same visible release path as the toxic-side protection channel.
rationale: Carry forward the raw screen_0009 tri-channel split, but gate inventory-centering relief behind quiet balanced conditions so the quote does not reveal or subsidize inventory pressure.
title: Inventory-toxicity router with price-reading mask
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes the route and visibility of the inventory channel rather than only reweighting the same additive fee surface.
